title: neobathiea perrieri
intro: Neobathiea perrieri is a species of flowering plant in the family Asclepiadaceae, commonly known as the Madagascar milkweed vine due to its milky sap. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimalarial activities, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Neobathiea perrieri include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and exhibit antiviral properties. Traditionally, herbal preparations of Neobathiea perrieri have been used in folk medicine, often in the form of infusions or decoctions made from the plant's leaves and stems.
